_note: Data flow from Engine.ServeHTTP through route tree dispatch to response writing. Gin is a framework so there is no persistence layer; the chain ends at response writing. ServeHTTP gets a Context from the pool, resets it, calls handleHTTPRequest which looks up the route tree via node.getValue, then invokes the handler chain via Context.Next. User handlers call response methods (JSON/String/Render) which ultimately call responseWriter.Write. Verified at commit d3ffc998.
